_comment: ATS types: 'greenhouse' (token = slug at boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/<token>), 'comeet_html' (url = careers page URL containing Comeet job UIDs like F2.C4D), 'amazon' (Amazon Jobs search), 'skip' (not tracked, see reason). Tokens for unconfirmed Greenhouse companies were guessed and 404'd; set ats='skip' until verified manually by visiting boards.greenhouse.io/<token>.

companies.name: Rapyd
companies.reason: Greenhouse token unconfirmed - verify at boards.greenhouse.io/{candidate}

companies.reason: JS-rendered careers site (own API needs auth)

filters._comment: Title must contain all of (titleMustMatch) AND at least one of (seniorityIndicators) AND none of (excludeTitle). Location must contain at least one of (locationMustMatch) AND none of (excludeLocation).
